title: hedyotis glabra
intro: Hedyotis glabra, also known as the sweet root or Thai chamomile, is a flowering plant native to China and Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Hedyotis glabra has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of fever and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, and infusions for its medicinal purposes, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
